ns0:entry.ns0:title: Homebrew/homebrew-core

URL: https://github.com/Homebrew/homebrew-core
Language: ruby
🍻 Default formulae for the missing package manager for macOS (or Linux)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: activeadmin/activeadmin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/activeadmin/activeadmin
Language: ruby
The administration framework for Ruby on Rails applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: caxlsx/caxlsx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/caxlsx/caxlsx
Language: ruby
xlsx generation with charts, images, automated column width, customizable styles and full schema validation. Axlsx excels at helping you generate beautiful Office Open XML Spreadsheet documents without having to understand the entire ECMA specification. Check out the README for some examples of how easy it is. Best of all, you can validate your…

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chef/chef
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chef/chef
Language: ruby
Chef Infra, a powerful automation platform that transforms infrastructure into code automating how infrastructure is configured, deployed and managed across any environment, at any scale

ns0:entry.ns0:title: discourse/discourse
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/discourse/discourse
Language: ruby
A platform for community discussion. Free, open, simple.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: docusealco/docuseal
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/docusealco/docuseal
Language: ruby

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/faker-ruby/faker
Language: ruby
A library for generating fake data such as names, addresses, and phone numbers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: github-linguist/linguist
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/github-linguist/linguist
Language: ruby

Create agents that monitor and act on your behalf. Your agents are standing by!
